spec_match.rationale: The native TOC uses scroll-target-group auto and :target-current on real anchor links.

interactive.rationale: Visitors can scroll the article, jump between sections, advance to the next section, and toggle sticky TOCs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page directly demonstrates the no-scroll-listener TOC use case from the feature motivation.

edge_cases.rationale: A side-by-side IntersectionObserver implementation and sticky-positioning toggle cover the requested comparisons.

references.rationale: The page now links to chromestatus.com/feature/5189126177161216 and the spec.

design_system.rationale: The demo uses shared variables, strong contrast pairs, and no custom button color override.

summary: The TOC demo now compares native scroll marker tracking with an IntersectionObserver alternative and includes sticky behavior.
